changelog: Fixes the one defect found when v16 was live-tested (2026-07-05, cytech-18): ensure_ssh_admin_access() was setting the SSH addon's `watchdog` property NESTED inside `options`, but `watchdog` is a top-level addon property -- so Supervisor silently ignored it and watchdog stayed false the whole time, leaving the auto-restart-on-crash safety net that v16 specified never actually enabled. The addon stayed up anyway (the persistent password prevents the v15 crash-on-blind-start), but the net wasn't there. Now sent at the top level alongside boot, verified to stick (watchdog: false -> true). Also fixes the idempotency check, which was reading .data.options.watchdog (always null) and so pointlessly re-POSTing the addon config on every single boot.
warnings: HA will restart automatically after this update to load the new shell_command definition.

SSH access behavior has changed: the Advanced SSH & Web Terminal addon will now stay running permanently instead of being off except during active operations, using a persistent per-device password (visible in /config/.ssh_admin_password) rather than being locked out after every Reset to Default.
